name: punch-character-motion
description: Verify punch input visibly moves the avatar arm on modern AnimationConstraint and legacy Motor6D rigs, recovers cleanly, and remains readable when reduced camera motion is enabled.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,CritChance=0,SettingsJSON=game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode({motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1})}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) return true

steps.label: prepare a valid Brick Wall punch

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local RS=game:GetService("RunService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local character=p.Character local root=character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") local hand=character:FindFirstChild("RightHand") or character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") local joint for _,d in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do if (d:IsA("Motor6D") or d:IsA("AnimationConstraint")) and (d.Name=="RightShoulder" or d.Name=="Right Shoulder") then joint=d break end end assert(root and hand and joint,"punch rig parts missing") local startLocal=root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(hand.Position) local maxRelativeDelta=0 local phases={} local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 task.spawn(function() g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") end) local started=os.clock() while os.clock()-started<.82 do RS.RenderStepped:Wait() local currentLocal=root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(hand.Position) maxRelativeDelta=math.max(maxRelativeDelta,(currentLocal-startLocal).Magnitude) phases[g:GetAttribute("PunchMotionPhase") or "nil"]=true end task.wait(.3) local maxAngle=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchAppliedMaxAngle") or 0 local maxPosition=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchAppliedMaxOffset") or 0 local peak=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionPeak") or 0 local active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive") local dramatic=maxRelativeDelta>.75 and maxAngle>1 and maxAngle<=math.pi and maxPosition>1.2 and maxPosition<2.2 and peak>.9 and phases.Windup and phases.Contact and phases.Recovery and not active return H:JSONEncode({class=joint.ClassName,rig=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchRig"),count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,peak=peak,maxAngle=maxAngle,maxPosition=maxPosition,maxRelativeDelta=maxRelativeDelta,windup=phases.Windup==true,contact=phases.Contact==true,recovery=phases.Recovery==true,renderOverride=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchRenderOverride"),active=active,dramatic=dramatic})

steps.label: punch visibly moves the hand through windup contact and recovery

args.code: local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local snapshot=g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=false,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) return snapshot and snapshot.motion==false

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local RS=game:GetService("RunService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local hand=p.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand") or p.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=false,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) local remaining=1.02-(os.clock()-(g:GetAttribute("LastPunchActionAt") or 0)) if remaining>0 then task.wait(remaining) end local startLocal=root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(hand.Position) local maxRelativeDelta=0 local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 task.spawn(function() g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") end) local started=os.clock() while os.clock()-started<.82 do RS.RenderStepped:Wait() maxRelativeDelta=math.max(maxRelativeDelta,(root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(hand.Position)-startLocal).Magnitude) end task.wait(.25) local result=H:JSONEncode({count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,suppressed=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionSuppressed"),reduced=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchReducedMotion"),cameraFollow=g:GetAttribute("PunchCameraFollowEnabled"),maxRelativeDelta=maxRelativeDelta,visible=maxRelativeDelta>.75,active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive")}) g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) return result

steps.label: reduced motion keeps punch action while suppressing camera follow
